Here is the lexicon for a synthetic language:

=== LEXICON START ===
{content}
=== LEXICON END ===

Here is a quality assessment of it:
=== JUDGEMENT START ===
{judgement}
=== JUDGEMENT END ===

Please produce a corrected version of the lexicon that fixes all issues listed in the judgement.
Preserve as much valid information as possible, changing only what the corrections specify.

Output must be in the same format - a CSV with EXACTLY this header:

form,pos,translation

Each row must have 3 comma-separated fields:
- form: the full conlang word form
- pos: part of speech (e.g. noun, verb, adj, adposition, pronoun)
- translation: the English meaning

Provide no additional explanation.
